feed.title: RWAscope Weekly Brief
feed.subtitle: Weekly policy-to-market intelligence on tokenized real-world assets. HKUST Crypto-Fintech Lab.

entry.title: Weekly Brief · Week of 2026-05-26
entry.summary: Global RWA Intelligence Brief — Week of 1 Jun 2026
entry.content:
Global RWA Intelligence Brief — Week of 1 Jun 2026

  • HKMA issued the first two licences under the Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap.
  • HKMA officially launched EnsembleTX, the real-value settlement phase of Project Ensemble, on 13 November 2025.
  • Hong Kong's Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap.

AI-generated summary — verify against source.
